name: claude-code-notifier-plus
description: Get notifications when Claude Code needs your attention — works in both CLI and VS Code extension mode

commands.title: Claude Code Notifier Plus: Send Test Notification

claudeCodeNotifierPlus.notifyOnPermissio.description: Notify when Claude is asking for permission to run a command.

claudeCodeNotifierPlus.notifyOnQuestion.description: Notify when Claude needs to ask you a question before continuing.

claudeCodeNotifierPlus.notifyOnTaskCompl.description: Notify when Claude finishes a task and is waiting for your next instruction.

claudeCodeNotifierPlus.notifyOnSubagentS.description: Notify when a Claude subagent finishes its task.

claudeCodeNotifierPlus.systemNotificatio.description: Show an OS-level notification pop-up in addition to the VS Code notification.

claudeCodeNotifierPlus.sound.description: Play a sound when Claude needs your attention.

claudeCodeNotifierPlus.notificationDelay.description: Seconds to wait before playing sound and showing the OS notification. Dismissing the VS Code popup within this time cancels them.

claudeCodeNotifierPlus.showVSCodePopup.description: Show a VS Code warning popup when Claude needs attention. Turn off to only receive OS-level system notifications and sound.

claudeCodeNotifierPlus.suppressWhenFocus.description: Skip the system notification and sound when VS Code is the active window. The VS Code popup still appears. When false (default), notifications are always sent regardless of focus state.
